opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hand is swollen like a balloon, freezing cold, and throbbing with a burning pain I can't tolerate.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on really fast over the last 12 hours and the pain is unbearable — I can't move my hand or manage anything on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: I twisted my wrist about 4 weeks ago, only a minor thing, but over the last 12 hours it's suddenly got dramatically worse
symptom_narrative.duration: the injury was 4 weeks ago; this awful flare-up is the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: burning and throbbing, and the skin keeps changing colour between a dusky blue and red
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable — I can't tolerate it, it's worse than anything I've felt
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right hand, and it spreads up into my forearm
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and even the tiniest movement of my fingers makes it flare and I feel sick and dizzy
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps; I tried an ice pack and it made it much worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: even light brushing of the skin or moving my fingers; the ice made it far worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the hand looks swollen and feels freezing cold, and I feel nauseous and lightheaded when the pain spikes
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, nothing like this before — it all started after I hurt my wrist
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't use my right hand at all — I can't dress, cook, open my medication bottles or even hold the phone properly

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a minor wrist sprain about 4 weeks ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and is struggling to manage day-to-day because the dominant hand is unusable

objective_data_offered.value: I checked my temperature and it was normal, about 36.8
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch says my heart rate is sitting around 100 to 105
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: wearable reading while in severe pain and distress

objective_data_offered.value: my right hand is very swollen and looks mottled and blotchy, changing between bluish and red, and it looks and feels colder than my other hand
the skin isn't hot or bright red and there are no red streaks spreading up my arm
